final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial documentary photograph for a Weibo news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; main scene horizontally extended
Subject: must include a city skyline at dusk with neon lights gradually brightening, hurrying pedestrians, and distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk cityscape — neon signs coming alive, golden-hour light bouncing off glass towers, real street-level presence
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere with high contrast between warm sunset and cool neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-cool dusk direction with vivid neon accents against a glowing sky — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs sharp, high-resolution 8K-grade detail texture — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold, prominent position — 黑体 or modern sans-serif), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle, secondary size), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right or bottom)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 aspect ratio; must feel like a real on-scene photo with cinematic impact; text zones must remain legible against the image
Avoid: must avoid overly staged or studio-lit look; must avoid cluttered composition that blocks text readability
